senior_junior_culture.summary: No reliable college-wide conclusion. A few student discussions imply peer help and coding interaction, but there are too few independent, identity-verifiable accounts to generalize about mentorship, hierarchy or ragging.
negative_themes: insufficient evidence on batch interaction and club hierarchy

academic_culture.summary: Official sources describe programmes and branch-change rules, but recent independent evidence on attendance strictness, grading, faculty accessibility and internship flexibility is insufficient.
positive_themes: official curriculum supports CSE/ECE and new specializations
branch change exists under a high-CGPA rule
negative_themes: student-level workload and flexibility not verified

hostel_reality.summary: The official 2026 profile describes permanent-campus hostel capacity, while some older negative reports concern the former transit-campus period. Recent public accounts are too limited to rate cleanliness, mess, water, curfew or complaint resolution.
positive_themes: new permanent-campus hostel buildings are publicly visible
negative_themes: current allotment guarantee, occupancy, mess fee and day-to-day service quality are not verified

club_and_campus_life.summary: Official material documents technical, sports, music, drama and entrepreneurship activities in 2022-24. Current 2026 activity of most clubs is not established from recent official posts.
negative_themes: many latest verifiable activities are older than one year
club_and_campus_life.evidence_strength: Moderate repeated signal for historical activity; limited for current activity

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: Official evidence shows coding competitions, hackathons and recognisable recruiters; recent student reports are generally positive about coding peers. Placement transparency is incomplete because counts, medians and role-wise results were not consistently published in accessible structured form.
negative_themes: placement-rate denominator and role/branch access are unclear
new specializations have no historical branch-specific outcomes

locality_and_student_life.summary: The permanent campus is in the Nanoli-Talegaon/Maval area rather than central Pune. Official distances support rail and road connectivity, but daily city access and late-evening transport convenience remain student-experience questions.
positive_themes: Talegaon railway station and bus stand are within the wider local area
regional industrial belt may offer hardware/manufacturing exposure
negative_themes: distance from central Pune and major technology clusters
public-transport frequency and last-mile options not verified

overall_satisfaction.summary: The available recent student evidence is too small and self-selected to estimate college-wide satisfaction or whether most students would choose the institute again.
positive_themes: new campus and peer coding are recurring positives
negative_themes: fees, placement transparency, location and unfinished-service uncertainty recur as decision questions
